title: Amityville Chupacabra
overview: When a team of cryptozoologists captures a legendary beast, they unleash an unstoppable nightmare inside a secret facility. Stalked and torn apart one by one, survival becomes impossible as the Amityville Chupacabra claims its prey. A creature feature of blood, legend, and fear—this is Amityville like you’ve never seen before.
